SEARCH
Package com.apigee.openapi.converter

Class ConversionResult

java.lang.Object
com.apigee.openapi.converter.ConversionResult
public class ConversionResult extends Object
Result of an Apigee to OpenAPI conversion. Contains the generated OpenAPI specification and metadata about the conversion.

    Returns any warnings generated during conversion.

    Returns whether there were any warnings.
